Text.Page:
I have materials for leathercrafter's vests, and you're just itching to craft something today, aren't you?

Make some and come see me.

Nice, very nice. This is fine work, .

If I've said it once I've said it a million times: "Ready for the field!"

Deliver the vests to Jakarian in Chebika. He needs all the armor he can get.
You've got the design and kits. Talk to the crafting vendors if you need additional materials.

The vests? Excellent! I'll put them to good use, my friend.

For the federation!
